description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular shell with a matte dark gray finish, giving it a tactical and futuristic appearance. The front is equipped with a gold-tinted full-face visor that provides ample facial coverage and protection. Subtle blue accent lights or details are visible near the lower sides, adding a modern technological touch. The helmet's sides are reinforced with additional panels and what appear to be integrated communication or audio modules. The surface is mostly smooth with some panel lines and geometric indentations, suggesting reinforced construction. There are no visible logos, graphics, or elaborate patterns, emphasizing a utilitarian and professional design.
description: A matte dark gray tactical helmet with a gold-tinted full-face visor and blue accent details, featuring a smooth, angular, and reinforced design.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the helmet's broad, smooth crown and central ridge, with subtle panel lines and no visible visor.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the gold-tinted visor, blue accent details, and reinforced side panels with integrated modules.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full-face gold visor, angular lower face guard, and symmetrical side panels.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the visor, blue accents, and robust side construction.
